package rulecoverage

func PositiveLowerOrFuncWrappedIndexedColumn() string {
    ruleID := "lower_or_func_wrapped_indexed_column"
    family := "data_access"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "LOWER() or other functions wrapping indexed columns in WHERE clauses, preventing index usage."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
